title: bug Restore model frontier chart to AC1 y-axis
description:
Feature: Model frontier graph uses AC1 axis
  Scenario: Procedure result rows drive the y axis from feedback alignment AC1
    Given feedback evaluation metrics include Alignment and Accuracy
    When model frontier rows are built
    Then accuracy_axis is populated from Alignment/AC1 for the chart
    And the dashboard labels the y axis as Feedback AC1

Rationale: the current chart scale is designed for AC1 from -1 to 1; switching to raw Accuracy made the graph scale incorrectly in the UI.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Restored model frontier y-axis to feedback Alignment/AC1 and reverted chart/table labels to Feedback AC1. Verified Python tests, chart Jest test, py_compile, and dashboard typecheck.
